behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all four files tested, the kill-all command, the daemon pattern strings (run-mcp-server, --daemon-session), and the platform-specific approaches (ps aux+SIGKILL, PowerShell).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes behavior and platform approach but leaves function naming, routing, and implementation details to the agent.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for string presence (SIGKILL or Stop-Process, execSync or exec, win32 or platform) and routing via commandName or subcommand, accommodating multiple valid implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run node --check, npm run build, lint-packages, check-deps, plus parsing of source files via node scripts.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual registration in commandsArray, routing logic, and implementation with platform-specific kill logic — a stub couldn't satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover command registration, platform logic, routing, and doc updates in both SKILL.md and session-management.md as required.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Fail-to-pass pr_diff, agent_config, Pass-to-pass static, repo_tests) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and command names match across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to files but doesn't specify exact lines or code to change; localization within those files is still required.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Documentation diffs in SKILL.md and session-management.md are small additions, not rewrites.
